expectations.text: Covers all pension pillars: AFP, OTP, IPS, and folkepensjon
expectations.evidence: All four pillars covered in detail.

expectations.text: Explains AFP eligibility rules and notes requirement for 7 of last 9 years
expectations.evidence: Clear rule statement. Also flags self-employment risk.

expectations.text: Notes IPS max increases to 25,000 kr from 2026 with 5,500 kr tax deduction
Projects OTP accumulation based on typical employer contribution rates
Models pension income at multiple ages (at least 62, 65, and 67)
expectations.evidence: No combined table at 62/65/67 — but individual pillar projections at multiple ages and bridge calculations at 50/52/55/58/60.

expectations.text: Recommends maximizing IPS contribution with clear reasoning
expectations.evidence: Ranked 'High Priority.' Four reasons including interest-free loan from government.

expectations.text: Connects pension to FI: explains that expected pension income reduces the required FI portfolio size
expectations.evidence: Full bridge strategy section. 'Your FI challenge is primarily a bridge problem.'

expectations.text: States current Freedom Ladder level explicitly
expectations.evidence: No Freedom Ladder reference anywhere. Uses FI terminology but no level classification.

expectations.text: References vault data not in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Mentions GTB Ventures/self-employment risk but as a general observation, not citing specific vault data. No tax return figures, OKR references, or demerger strategy.

expectations.text: Follows the output format: Freedom Ladder status bar, Summary, FI Impact, Analysis stages, Next Actions
expectations.evidence: Has Summary and recommendations but no Freedom Ladder status bar, no formal Screening/Adversarial/Scenario/Recommendation stages.
